ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the workspace where the project is located */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_workspace_id FOREIGN KEY ("workspace_id") REFERENCES workspaces ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the workspace was created */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the workspace */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the workspace is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workspaces_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bugs" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the bug belongs to */,
  "bug_type" TEXT /* Type of bug (e.g., defect, enhancement, task) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the bug (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "assignee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the bug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bug */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the bug */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the bug was last updated */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated time to resolve the bug */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual time spent on resolving the bug */,
  "reproducibility" TEXT /* How often the bug can be reproduced */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bugs_assignee_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_types" (
  "bug_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug type */,
  "bug_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bug type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bug type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_internal" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is internal */,
  "edited_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was last edited */,
  "edited_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_edited_by FOREIGN KEY ("edited_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_comments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the change belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "from_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the field */,
  "to_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_history_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the mention belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who was mentioned */,
  "mention_date" TEXT /* Date when the mention was made */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the mention has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the mention was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES bug_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mentions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug the attachment belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  "uploaded_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_attachments_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., bug update, mention) */,
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bug related to the notification */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the notification has been read */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was read */,
  "is_email_sent" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if an email was sent for the notification */,
  "email_sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the email was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_bug_id FOREIGN KEY ("bug_id") REFERENCES bugs ("bug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint that was called */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the API call was made */,
  "request_body" TEXT /* Body of the API request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the API call */,
  "response_code" INTEGER /* HTTP response code of the API call */,
  "response_body" TEXT /* Body of the API response */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the API call in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_api_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
